info.name: Rikkei Bank - API Tests
info.description:
**HTTP Status Code Standard**

- 200 OK: Truy vấn/Cập nhật thành công.
- 201 Created: Tạo mới thành công.
- 204 No Content: Xóa thành công.
- 400 Bad Request: Validation thất bại.
- 401 Unauthorized: Thiếu/Sai Token.
- 403 Forbidden: Không đủ quyền truy cập.
- 409 Conflict: Xung đột nghiệp vụ (VD: Số dư không đủ để chuyển khoản).
- 500 Internal Server Error: Lỗi hệ thống bất ngờ.

exec: pm.test('Auth login should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Auth login failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Auth login response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Login response success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Login success message mismatch').to.eql('Login successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Login response missing accessToken').to.have.property('accessToken'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Login response missing refreshToken').to.have.property('refreshToken'); });
pm.environment.set('accessToken', body.data.accessToken);
pm.environment.set('refreshToken', body.data.refreshToken);
pm.environment.set('accessToken_admin', body.data.accessToken);
pm.environment.set('refreshToken_admin', body.data.refreshToken);
pm.test('Auth login should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Auth login failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Auth login response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Login response success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Login success message mismatch').to.eql('Login successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Login response missing accessToken').to.have.property('accessToken'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Login response missing refreshToken').to.have.property('refreshToken'); });
pm.environment.set('accessToken_staff', body.data.accessToken);
pm.environment.set('accessToken', body.data.accessToken);
pm.environment.set('refreshToken_staff', body.data.refreshToken);
pm.test('Auth login should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Auth login failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Auth login response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Login response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Login response success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Login success message mismatch').to.eql('Login successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Login response missing accessToken').to.have.property('accessToken'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Login response missing refreshToken').to.have.property('refreshToken'); });
pm.environment.set('accessToken', body.data.accessToken);
pm.environment.set('refreshToken_customer', body.data.refreshToken);
pm.environment.set('accessToken_customer', body.data.accessToken);
pm.test('Auth register should return 201 Created', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Auth register failed').to.eql(201); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Auth register response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Register response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Register response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Register response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Register response success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Register success message mismatch').to.eql('Registration submitted successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Register response missing userId').to.have.property('userId'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Register response missing kycId').to.have.property('kycId'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Register response missing kycStatus').to.have.property('kycStatus'); pm.expect(body.data.kycStatus, 'New KYC should be PENDING').to.eql('PENDING'); });
pm.environment.set('registeredUserId', body.data.userId);
pm.environment.set('registeredUsername', body.data.username);
pm.environment.set('registeredEmail', body.data.email);
pm.environment.set('kycId', body.data.kycId);
// Ensure a refreshToken variable exists (prefer admin)
if(!pm.environment.get('refreshToken')){
var rt = pm.environment.get('refreshToken_admin') || pm.environment.get('refreshToken_staff') || pm.environment.get('refreshToken_customer');
if(rt){ pm.environment.set('refreshToken', rt); }
pm.test('Refresh token should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Refresh token failed').to.eql(200); });

try { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Refresh token response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(b, 'Refresh token response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(b, 'Refresh token response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(b, 'Refresh token response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(b.success, 'Refresh token success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(b.message, 'Refresh token message mismatch').to.eql('Token refreshed successfully'); pm.expect(b.data, 'Refresh token response missing accessToken').to.have.property('accessToken'); }); if(b.data && b.data.accessToken){ pm.environment.set('accessToken', b.data.accessToken); } } catch(e){ pm.test('Refresh token response should be valid JSON', ()=>{ throw new Error('Invalid JSON response: ' + e.message); }); }
pm.test('Logout should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Logout failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Logout response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Logout response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Logout response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Logout response missing data').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Logout success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Logout success message mismatch').to.eql('Logout successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Logout data must be null').to.eql(null); });

// Optionally clear accessToken after logout
pm.environment.unset('accessToken');
pm.test('Admin get all users should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Get all users failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Get all users response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Message mismatch').to.eql('Users retrieved successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Paged user data missing content').to.have.property('content'); pm.expect(body.data.content, 'User content should be an array').to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Admin get user by id should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Get user by id failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Get user by id response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Message mismatch').to.eql('User retrieved successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'User data missing id').to.have.property('id'); });
pm.test('Admin create user should return 200 or 201', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Create user returned unexpected status').to.be.oneOf([200,201]); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Create user response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Create user message mismatch').to.eql('Created successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Created user data missing id').to.have.property('id'); });
pm.test('Admin update user should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Update user failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Update user response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Update user message mismatch').to.eql('User updated successfully'); });
pm.test('Admin delete user should return 200 or 204', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Delete user returned unexpected status').to.be.oneOf([200,204]); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Delete user response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Delete user message mismatch').to.eql('User deleted successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Delete user data must be null').to.eql(null); });
pm.test('Staff get all users should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Staff get all users failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Staff get all users response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Message mismatch').to.eql('Users retrieved successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Paged user data missing content').to.have.property('content'); });
pm.test('Staff approve KYC should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Approve KYC failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Approve KYC response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Approve message mismatch').to.eql('KYC approved successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Approve KYC data must be null').to.eql(null); });
pm.test('Staff reject KYC should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Reject KYC failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Reject KYC response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Reject message mismatch').to.eql('KYC rejected successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Reject KYC data must be null').to.eql(null); });
// Ensure customer token exists; mark test fail if missing but don't throw
pm.test('Customer token should exist before KYC upload', function(){ pm.expect(pm.environment.get('accessToken_customer'), 'accessToken_customer is missing').to.not.be.undefined; });
pm.test('Customer KYC upload should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'KYC upload failed').to.eql(200); });

try { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.test('KYC upload response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(b, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(b, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(b, 'Response missing data object').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(b.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(b.message, 'KYC upload message mismatch').to.eql('KYC uploaded successfully'); }); if(b.data && b.data.id){ pm.environment.set('kycId', b.data.id); } } catch(e){ pm.test('KYC upload response should be valid JSON', ()=>{ throw new Error('Invalid JSON response: ' + e.message); }); }
pm.test('Customer get balance should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Get balance failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Get balance response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Balance message mismatch').to.eql('Balance retrieved successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Balance response is not numeric').to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Balance must be non-negative').to.be.at.least(0); });
pm.test('Customer change PIN should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Change PIN failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Change PIN response should follow ApiResponse format', function(){ pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'Change PIN message mismatch').to.eql('PIN changed successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'Change PIN data must be null').to.eql(null); });
pm.test('Customer transfer should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Transfer failed').to.eql(200); });

try { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Transfer response should follow ApiResponse format', () => { pm.expect(b, 'Transfer response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(b, 'Transfer response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(b, 'Transfer response missing data').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(b.success, 'Transfer response success must be true').to.equal(true); pm.expect(b.message, 'Transfer success message mismatch').to.eql('Transfer successfully'); }); } catch(e){ pm.test('Transfer response should be valid JSON', () => { throw new Error('Invalid JSON response: ' + e.message); }); }
pm.test('Customer transaction history should return 200 OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, 'Transaction history failed').to.eql(200); });
const body = pm.response.json();

pm.test('Transaction history response should follow ApiResponse format', () => { pm.expect(body, 'Response missing success flag').to.have.property('success'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing message').to.have.property('message'); pm.expect(body, 'Response missing data').to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(body.success, 'Success must be true').to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.message, 'History message mismatch').to.eql('Transaction history retrieved successfully'); pm.expect(body.data, 'History data should contain content').to.have.property('content'); pm.expect(body.data.content, 'History content should be an array').to.be.an('array'); });
